limitations: This is the official OKX public API response example, not a contemporaneous live trade stream.
OKX trade side is interpreted as taker side according to the public API documentation.
A same-price touch is diagnostic only and never proves maker queue execution.
Trade-through volume is first applied to an explicit queue-ahead assumption before the paper order.
No spread, slippage, market impact, latency cost, account access or order placement is represented.
